title: Contract
description: A deployed EVM smart contract on Ethereum, Base, Optimism, Polygon, Arbitrum, or another EVM chain. The EVM analogue of the Solana Program entity.

address.description: Hex-encoded EVM address. 0x-prefixed, 40 hex chars. Mixed-case checksum form per EIP-55 is preserved verbatim; all-lower is also accepted.

chain.description: Canonical chain identifier. Use the CAIP-2-style network name for popular EVM chains. Custom values are allowed for testnets and L3s.

chainId.description: Numeric EVM chain ID (1 = Ethereum mainnet, 8453 = Base, 10 = Optimism, 137 = Polygon, 42161 = Arbitrum). Optional but recommended for downstream verification.

name.description: Human label for the contract, e.g. 'Vault', 'Router', 'USDC'.

abiHash.description: sha256 hex of the canonicalized JSON ABI for the deployed contract version.

sourceCommit.description: git sha the deployed bytecode was built from.

txHash.description: Transaction hash of the deployment, when known.
